meta.core: model/dp.js (exact Bellman DP) over model/astrogem.js + model/nested.js
meta.valueDef: cell.cut = W(freshGem level-1, maxTurns[rarity], maxRerolls[rarity], cm=0); bucket = effect pair (2_damage/optimal_damage/suboptimal_damage/no_damage). Tier (Leg/Relic/Anc) is the fusion-fodder split p_fodder_*, NOT the primary axis.
